issue_title: The tracer no longer highlights the current line - no red box around it
issue_body_preview:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ff53171e-899d-4a01-b1b5-bfabd24090ea)

I set a stop on foo[1] and then called foo.  Note that the stop blob is present, but there's no indication that the code is suspended on foo[1].  If you were to trace into foo, again there would be no red box
test_description_zh: 在 Ride IDE 中定义一个函数（如 foo），在函数的某一行（如 foo[1]）设置一个停止点（stop），然后调用该函数使其在断点处挂起。观察 tracer 窗口中当前挂起行的高亮显示情况。同时尝试使用 trace into 进入函数，观察当前执行行的视觉标记。
expected_result_zh: 当代码在断点处挂起时，tracer 中当前挂起的行应显示红色边框（红色方框）高亮标记，清楚地指示代码当前暂停在哪一行。使用 trace into 进入函数时，同样应在当前执行行周围显示红色方框高亮。
